sglang.title: Implement Siglip Vision model, and support BNB quantization for gemma3-mm
sglang.author: guapisolo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Support unsloth gemma-3 multimodal model:

unsloth/gemma-3-4b-it-bnb-4bit
unsloth/gemma-3-4b-it-unsloth-bnb-4bit

Modifications


Implemented Siglip Vision model in sglang, according to transformers.
Let gemma-3 uses the Siglip model as vision tower.
Fix prefix name bug in clip.py when l

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix adding bias twice in ipex GPTQ quantization
vllm.author: rand-fly
vllm.bodyExcerpt: ipex_qlinear has already added bias in it, but the current implementation added bias again to the output of ipex_qlinear. This causes GPTQ quantized models with QKV bias such as Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-GPTQ-Int4 to have wrong outputs on CPU.

vllm.title: [CI] Add mteb testing to test the accuracy of the embedding model
vllm.author: noooop
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:

Add mteb STS12 testing to test the accuracy of the embedding model (tests/entrypoints/openai/correctness/test_mteb.py)

Task selection
Although mteb v2 significantly speeds up the testing process, it still requires several hours to complete all tests.
Here choose a small test task in mteb:

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix MRoPE Errors in the Qwen-VL Model When Processing Pure Text
vllm.author: wulipc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We found that under the V0 engine, when the Qwen-VL model is given pure text input, the get_input_positions function incorrectly generates position_ids  with shape [n] instead of the expected [3, n]. This leads to inconsistent outputs between eager mode and CUDA Graph mode.
This PR mainly fixes the

vllm.title: [Misc] refactor prompt embedding examples
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
move to examples dir
refactor the examples

vllm.title: [Minor] Rename quantization nvfp4 to modelopt_fp4
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since it is a specialization of the modelopt format, I think better to make the name more explicitly related. Tested manually using vllm serve nvidia/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct-FP4 --quantization modelopt_fp4

vllm.title: [Kernel] update comment for KV shape in unified triton attn
vllm.author: haochengxia
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Unified Triton attention uses a new layout of KV, but the comment in the code has not been updated.
shape of K cache: torch.Size([11784, 16, 8, 128])  # blk num, blk size, head num, head size
shape of V cache: torch.Size([11784, 16, 8, 128])

vllm.title: fix:Build torch wheel inline rather than picking from nightly
vllm.author: dilipgb
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The torch binaries in nightly mirror will get pruned every 3 months and forces the version bump. This PR builds the torch binaries inline till the community publishes the s390x supported wheels on the pypi mirror.

vllm.title: [TPU] Re-enable the Pallas MoE kernel
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Thank you to @yaochengji for debugging the issues that arose with TP inference using the pallas moe kernel under batching. This kernel is needed for efficient compilation+inference of models with many small experts, like Qwen3MoE.
Evaluation on Qwen3Moe:
server:
vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B --max-m

vllm.title: [Bugfix] config.head_dim is now explicitly set to None
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Starting from transformers == 4.52.0 due to the huggingface/transformers@6f4058a#diff-e3f568ba34f66657a90b8e138028e69f5ce07050f549d45bd7c4ffc8a5a0b3a4L175 change (and others similar) it is no longer possible to use a fallback value for getattr, because head_dim is explicitly set to None

vllm.title: [Bug] Fix moe_sum signature
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The moe_sum op signature had the wrong argument marked as mutating.  This was causing #18421.
TODO: should add a unit test + opcheck test
cc @tlrmchlsmth , @mgoin

vllm.title: Revert "[Bugfix] Fix MRoPE Errors in the Qwen-VL Model When Processing Pure Text (#18407)"
vllm.author: DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Failing Test] Fix nixl connector test when promt size < block size
vllm.author: wwl2755
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix nixl connector test when promt size < block size, mentioned in issue #18419.
In #18232, we decided to adds the request to self._reqs_need_recv with an empty block list when it has a prompt size less than a block. In this case, we should skip to schedule an async read.

vllm.title: [Misc] MultiConnector._connectors type
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Really a minor thing, adding the type to keep mypy and my local python server happy.
